resolved_facts.fact: 2025 total revenue was $9.891 billion and free cash flow approximately $2.1 billion before the Apellis closing.
MS product revenue fell 7.1% while rare-disease product revenue rose 8.4%; growth products increased 19%.
Biogen completed the approximately $5.6 billion Apellis acquisition on May 14, 2026, financed with cash and borrowings, with contractual SYFOVRE sales-based CVRs up to $4 per Apellis share.

disputed_facts.issue: The valuation component ranges are analyst estimates, not values reproduced by the cited primary facts.

unresolved_material_facts: Product-level rebates, margins, sustaining cost and post-exclusivity tails do not reproduce marketed-product values.
Material indication probabilities, dependencies and remaining costs are not independently reconciled.
The first post-close balance sheet and purchase-price allocation were unavailable as of the evidence date.
